summary: Offline-First Tile Caching Feature Testing Complete - All 8 test requirements verified. Service Worker with TILES_CACHE is correctly served (HTTP 200). TilesDownloader component displays in Agent Terrain dashboard with cache stats and download button. ParcelMapGarmin shows 'En ligne' cache indicator badge. tilesCacheService.js functions generate valid tile URLs.
critical_code_review_comments: Service Worker correctly defines TILES_CACHE = 'greenlink-tiles-v1' with 200MB max limit
TILE_HOSTS array includes all OpenStreetMap subdomains (a, b, c)
tilesCacheFirst function implements Cache-First strategy for tiles
precacheTiles function downloads tiles in batches of 6 with progress reporting
trimTilesCache implements LRU cleanup when cache exceeds 200MB
TilesDownloader component has proper data-testid attributes for testing
ParcelMapGarmin shows 'En ligne' badge when navigator.onLine is true, 'Cache hors-ligne' when offline
Compact TilesDownloader only shows when !readOnly (not visible in cooperative read-only mode)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline-First tile caching feature fully implemented. Service Worker at /service-worker.js handles TILES_CACHE with Cache-First strategy. TilesDownloader component in Agent Terrain dashboard HomeTab. ParcelMapGarmin in PDC Fiche 2 shows cache indicator badge. Compact TilesDownloader only visible when map is editable (!readOnly).

service_worker: GET /service-worker.js - PASSED: Returns HTTP 200 with content-type application/javascript
TILE_HOSTS array - PASSED: Includes tile.openstreetmap.org and subdomains a, b, c
tilesCacheFirst function - PASSED: Implements Cache-First strategy
precacheTiles function - PASSED: Downloads tiles in batches with progress
trimTilesCache function - PASSED: LRU cleanup when cache exceeds limit
Message handlers - PASSED: PRECACHE_TILES, GET_TILES_CACHE_STATS, CLEAR_TILES_CACHE
tiles_cache_service: generateTileUrls - PASSED: Returns valid OSM tile URLs for given center/radius/zoom
boundsFromPolygon - PASSED: Calculates center and radius from polygon coordinates
requestTilesPrecache - PASSED: Posts PRECACHE_TILES message to SW
requestTilesCacheStats - PASSED: Gets cache stats from SW
requestClearTilesCache - PASSED: Clears tiles cache via SW
tiles_downloader_component: Agent Terrain Dashboard - PASSED: TilesDownloader component visible in HomeTab
data-testid='tiles-downloader' - PASSED: Component has correct test ID
Cache stats display - PASSED: Shows '0 tuiles — 0.0 Mo'
Download button - PASSED: 'Telecharger cartes de la zone' button present
data-testid='tiles-download-btn' - PASSED: Button has correct test ID
parcel_map_garmin: Map component - PASSED: ParcelMapGarmin renders in PDC Fiche 2
Cache indicator badge - PASSED: data-testid='map-cache-indicator' present
En ligne badge - PASSED: Shows 'En ligne' when online
Compact TilesDownloader - INFO: Only visible when !readOnly (not in cooperative read-only mode)
